title: 10 best herbal tinctures for arteriosclerosis
description: Black cohosh tinctures helps with arteriosclerosis because it has been shown to improve blood vessel elasticity, flexibility, and tone. This natural remedy contains triterpene saponins, which have been found to inhibit the formation of plaque in arteries, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress.
